description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant energy of New York City, where every corner is a blend of culture, history, and excitement. This 5-day journey is designed for family bonding, with a special focus on Harry Potter fandom, allowing you to explore magical spots and indulge in themed shopping. From iconic landmarks to cozy cafes, each day promises a delightful mix of relaxation and adventure, ensuring you create unforgettable memories together.

days.title: Departure from Washington D.C. to New York City

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic views along the East Coast during your train ride.

activities.description: Start your New York adventure with a delicious lunch at The Meatball Shop, known for its customizable meatballs and casual vibe. Perfect for a family meal!

activities.activity: Visit Harry Potter New York Store
activities.description: Dive into the magical world of Harry Potter at the flagship store in New York. Explore themed sections, interactive displays, and a wide range of exclusive merchandise. Don't forget to take a photo at the iconic Platform 9¾!
Take a leisurely stroll through Central Park, enjoying the beautiful landscapes and perhaps a quick stop at the Bethesda Terrace. It's a great way to relax and soak in the city's atmosphere.
Experience a unique dining experience at Ellen's Stardust Diner, where the waitstaff perform Broadway hits. It's a fun and entertaining way to enjoy a meal with the family!
End your day with a visit to the vibrant Times Square. The dazzling lights and bustling atmosphere are a must-see, and you can explore shops for more Harry Potter goodies!

days.title: Exploring Harry Potter's Magical New York

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Sarabeth's, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh fruit. It's a cozy spot to fuel up before a day of magical adventures!

activities.activity: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter Store
activities.description: Dive into the enchanting world of Harry Potter at this immersive store. Explore a wide range of merchandise, from wands to clothing, and don't forget to grab some exclusive collectibles!
activities.searchQuery: The Wizarding World of Harry Potter Store

activities.description: Enjoy a hearty lunch at The Meatball Shop, where you can customize your meatball dish with various sauces and sides. It's a fun and casual dining experience perfect for families!
Take a leisurely stroll through Bryant Park, a beautiful green oasis in the heart of the city. You can relax on the lawn, enjoy a book from the library, or simply soak in the vibrant atmosphere.
Visit the iconic New York Public Library, where you can admire its stunning architecture and explore the vast collection of books. Don't miss the famous Rose Main Reading Room!

activities.activity: Coffee Break at Blue Bottle Coffee
activities.description: Take a break and enjoy a cup of artisanal coffee at Blue Bottle Coffee. It's a great spot to recharge before continuing your magical journey!
End your day with a family-style dinner at Carmine's, where you can share delicious Italian dishes in a warm and inviting atmosphere. Perfect for a cozy family meal!
Conclude your magical day with an evening walk through the dazzling lights of Times Square. It's a vibrant experience that captures the essence of New York City!
Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Sarabeth's, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh fruit. The cozy atmosphere makes it a perfect spot to fuel up for a day of exploration.

activities.activity: Visit the Metropolitan Museum of Art
activities.description: Explore the vast collections at the Metropolitan Museum of Art, where you can immerse yourself in art from around the world. Don't miss the Egyptian artifacts and the stunning rooftop garden with views of Central Park.

Enjoy a leisurely lunch at The Modern, a Michelin-starred restaurant located at the Museum of Modern Art. The seasonal menu features contemporary American cuisine, perfect for a relaxing midday break.
Take a stroll through Central Park, where you can relax and enjoy the natural beauty. Consider visiting the Bethesda Terrace and the Bow Bridge for some picturesque views.

activities.activity: Visit the Harry Potter New York Store
activities.description: Dive into the magical world of Harry Potter at the official Harry Potter store in New York. Browse through a wide range of merchandise, from wands to clothing, and don't forget to take a photo at the iconic Platform 934.
End your day with a hearty dinner at The Smith, a lively American brasserie. Their menu features comfort food classics, and the vibrant atmosphere is perfect for families.
After a fulfilling day, return to your hotel to unwind. Enjoy some family time and share your favorite moments from the day.
Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Sarabeth's, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh fruit. The cozy atmosphere makes it a perfect spot to fuel up for a day of adventure!

Dive into the magical world of Harry Potter at The Harry Potter Exhibition. Explore authentic props, costumes, and interactive experiences that bring the wizarding world to life. Don't forget to take plenty of photos!
Enjoy a hearty lunch at The Meatball Shop, where you can customize your meatball dish with various sauces and sides. It's a fun and casual dining experience that the whole family will love!

Stroll through the iconic Times Square, where the bright lights and bustling atmosphere will leave you in awe. Take some time to shop for Harry Potter merchandise at the nearby stores, including the famous M&M's World!
Catch a matinee performance of a Broadway show. Whether it's a classic or a new hit, the energy of a live performance in the heart of the theater district is an unforgettable experience!
End your day with a family-style dinner at Carmine's, where you can share delicious Italian dishes in a lively atmosphere. It's a great way to relax and reflect on your magical day!

transit.memo: Traveling by train from New York City to Washington D.C.

activities.description: Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Sarabeth's, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh pastries. It's a cozy spot to fuel up before your adventures.

activities.activity: Visit The Wizarding World of Harry Potter Store
activities.description: Explore the magical world of Harry Potter at the flagship store in New York City. From wands to house robes, this store is a treasure trove for fans. Don't forget to take a photo at the iconic Hogwarts castle display!
Enjoy a casual lunch at The Meatball Shop, where you can customize your meatball dish with various sauces and sides. It's a fun and hearty meal to keep you energized.

Take a leisurely stroll through Central Park, enjoying the beautiful scenery and perhaps stopping by the Bethesda Terrace. It's a perfect way to relax and soak in the city's atmosphere before your journey.
Board your train to Washington D.C. and enjoy the scenic ride. This is a great time to reflect on your trip and relax before arriving at your next destination.
Once you arrive in Washington D.C., enjoy a hearty dinner at Founding Farmers, a popular farm-to-table restaurant known for its comfort food and sustainable practices.
